description: Minimal clean implementation of Byte Pair Encoding tokenizer

key_decisions.decision: Implement BPE from scratch instead of using tiktoken
key_decisions.reasoning: Tokenization is the part of LLMs most people treat as a black box. Building it yourself demystifies the whole pipeline.
Same philosophy as micrograd and nanoGPT — the idea should be expressible cleanly. If it isn't, you don't understand it yet.

key_decisions.decision: Support both basic and regex-based tokenization
key_decisions.reasoning: GPT-4's tokenizer uses regex pre-tokenization to prevent merges across certain boundaries. Important to understand why.

lessons: Tokenization is not just preprocessing — it fundamentally shapes what the model can and cannot learn
BPE is surprisingly simple once you implement it
Always understand your input pipeline before debugging your model
